nodes.standard_name: Movement for the Survival of the Ogoni People
nodes.original_text_name: Movimiento para la Supervivencia del Pueblo Ogoni (MOSOP)
nodes.context: Organization representing the Ogoni people in their struggle for ethnic and environmental rights.
Civil political organization fighting for the rights and interests of the Ijaw people.
Armed group formed by Ijaw youths, involved in conflict with NDV.
Paramilitary organization formed to counter NDPVF.
Armed group created by Asari in 2004, composed mainly of Ijaw, demanding oil wealth and supporting independence.
Armed group founded by Ateke Tom in 2003, composed mainly of Ijaw, operates around Port Harcourt, rival of NDPVF.

nodes.standard_name: Movement for the Emancipation of the Niger Delta
aliases: Movement for the Emancipation of the Niger Delta
nodes.context: Large armed group founded in December 2005, exposes exploitation and environmental devastation, involved in attacks on oil operations.
Armed group formed in January 2006, unites MEND, RNDPVF, and MB, integrated into NDTC negotiations.

nodes.standard_name: Reformed Niger Delta People's Volunteer Force
aliases: Reformed Niger Delta People's Volunteer Force
nodes.context: Group mentioned as part of JRC.
Group founded by Cynthia White in 2006, part of JRC.
Smaller guerrilla group led by Sam Ebiye, who was killed in 2009.
Armed group of Ijaw ethnicity, founded by Oboko Bello, operated in Warri region, had 3000 members in 2005.

nodes.standard_name: Movement for the Actualization of the Sovereign State of Biafra
aliases: Movement for the Actualization of the Sovereign State of Biafra
nodes.context: Secessionist movement formed in 1999, aims to revive Biafra, led by Ralph Uwazuruike.
Militant nationalist Yoruba group formed in 1997, operates in Benin and southwestern Nigeria.
Group seeking independence for Bakassi peninsula, founded in 2006, involved in kidnappings and terrorism.
Radical armed faction of BAMOSD.
Group that supports BAMOSD.
Group that supports BAMOSD.
Vigilante group operating in Igbo territory, accused of human rights abuses.
Armed group protecting Hausa and Fulani interests in northern Nigeria, formed December 13, 1999.
Group that gave financial support to Peter Odili's campaign; Asari lost control of it to Felix Tuodolor.

edges.evidence_quote: La intensa confrontación entre la NDPVF y NDV parece haber sido provocada por política de enfrentamiento de Asiri y el financiamiento del NDPVF a la campaña de Peter Odili, gobernador del estado de Rivers tras las elecciones de abril de 2003.
edges.context: The two groups were in intense confrontation, fighting for control of fuel supply routes.

edges.evidence_quote: El gobierno del estado respondió la escalada de la campaña en su contra mediante el envío de la policía, el ejército y la marina que ocupó Port Harcourt, en junio de 2004. Las fuerzas del gobierno colaboró con el NDV durante el verano, y dieron protección a milicianos del NDV de los ataques de la NDPVF.
edges.context: NDV was protected by government forces from NDPVF attacks, indicating conflict between NDPVF and NDV.

edges.evidence_quote: Odili retiró su apoyo financiero al NDPVF y comenzó a apoyar NDV de Tom, usándolo como grupo paramilitar para acabar con el NDPVF.
edges.context: NDV was used as a paramilitary group to eliminate NDPVF, confirming conflict.

edges.source: Movement for the Emancipation of the Niger Delta
edges.evidence_quote: JRC : Formado en enero de 2006, grupo armado que trata de agrupar y la acción común de los distintos grupos guerrilleros, agrupa al MEND, al RNDPVF y a la MB
edges.context: JRC unites MEND, RNDPVF, and MB for common action.

edges.source: Reformed Niger Delta People's Volunteer Force
edges.evidence_quote: JRC : Formado en enero de 2006, grupo armado que trata de agrupar y la acción común de los distintos grupos guerrilleros, agrupa al MEND, al RNDPVF y a la MB
edges.context: JRC unites MEND, RNDPVF, and MB for common action.

edges.evidence_quote: JRC : Formado en enero de 2006, grupo armado que trata de agrupar y la acción común de los distintos grupos guerrilleros, agrupa al MEND, al RNDPVF y a la MB
edges.context: JRC unites MEND, RNDPVF, and MB for common action.

edges.evidence_quote: Ha participado en acciones de secuestro y terrorismo sobre todo por el Bakassi Freedom Fighters , facción armada rádical del grupo
edges.context: Bakassi Freedom Fighters is the radical armed faction of BAMOSD.

edges.evidence_quote: recibe apoyo de la SCAPO y del NDDSC
recibe apoyo de la SCAPO y del NDDSC
La APC tiene un lema 'para preservar la indivisibilidad del país'. El grupo creó unas autodefensas en respuesta a la militarización de los yorubas del OPC.
edges.context: APC created self-defense forces in response to OPC's militarization, indicating conflict.

edges.source: Movement for the Emancipation of the Niger Delta
edges.evidence_quote: El MEND es parte del JRC que agrupa al MB, grupo fundado por White ese año, tras dejar de ser portavoz del NDPVF. El JRC se halla controlado por el MB.
edges.context: MEND is part of JRC, which includes MB; JRC is controlled by MB.
